answer:
We are given that \( f \) is odd and \( g \) is even, so  
\( f(-x) = -f(x) \) and \( g(-x) = g(x) \).  

The composition \( f(f(g(f(g(f(x)))))) \) is built from an odd number of odd functions (five \( f \)'s) and one even function \( g \), so overall it is odd.  

Thus the final answer is:

\boxed{odd}
